lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਵਖਾਨੈ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: guramukh naam sadaa sadaa vakhaanai |5|
lines.english: The Gurmukh chants the Naam, forever and ever. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਾਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਜਾਨੈ ॥
lines.translit: saachaa naam saachai sabad jaanai |
lines.english: The True Name is known through the True Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੈ ਆਪੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਚੂਕੈ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੈ ॥
lines.translit: aapai aap milai chookai abhimaanai |
lines.english: The Lord Himself meets that one who eradicates egotistical pride.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੰਚਨ ਕਾਇਆ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਸਮਾਈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: kanchan kaaeaa jotee jot samaaee |6|
lines.english: One's body sparkles like gold, and one's light merges into the Light. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਉਗਣ ਕਾਟਿ ਪਾਪਾ ਮਤਿ ਖਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: aaugan kaatt paapaa mat khaaee |
lines.english: Guilty mistakes are erased, and the sinful intellect is cleansed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਸੇਵਿਐ ਦੂਜੀ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: satigur seviai doojee duramat jaaee |
lines.english: Serving the True Guru, duality and evil-mindedness are taken away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖੁ ਕਾਟੈ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: dukh kaattai hiradai naam vasaaee |
lines.english: Pain is taken away, and the Naam comes to dwell within the heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਵਡੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: satigur miliai vaddee vaddiaaee |
lines.english: Meeting with the True Guru, one is blessed with glorious greatness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਮਾਨਿਆ ਕਰਣੀ ਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: guramat maaniaa karanee saar |
lines.english: Obeying the Gur's instructions, one's actions are purified.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਮਾਨਿਆ ਮੋਖ ਦੁਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: guramat maaniaa mokh duaar |
lines.english: Obeying the Guru's Instructions, one finds the state of salvation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਈ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: naam rate sadaa sukh paaee |7|
lines.english: Imbued with the Naam, one finds eternal peace. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਮਾਨਿਆ ਪਰਵਾਰੈ ਸਾਧਾਰੁ ॥੮॥੧॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak guramat maaniaa paravaarai saadhaar |8|1|3|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who follow the Guru's Teachings are saved, along with their families. ||8||1||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ਅਸਟਪਦੀਆ ਘਰੁ ੧੧ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 4 asattapadeea ghar 11 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fourth Mehl, Ashtpadheeyaa, Eleventh House:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਰਚੈ ਕੰਚਨ ਕਾਇਆ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਮਿਲਈਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: guramukh parachai kanchan kaaeaa nirbhau jotee jot mileea |1|
lines.english: The Gurmukh is inspired, his body is golden, and his light merges into the Light of the Fearless Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੈ ਆਪੁ ਖਾਇ ਹਉ ਮੇਟੈ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਰਸ ਗੀਤ ਗਵਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: aapai aap khaae hau mettai anadin har ras geet gaveea |
lines.english: One who eliminates his self-centeredness, and eradicates his ego, night and day sings the songs of the Lord's Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਨੁ ਪਲੁ ਰਹਿ ਨ ਸਕਉ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਠ ਪੜਈਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: khin pal reh na skau bin naavai guramukh har har paatth parreea |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I cannot live, for a moment, even for an instant, without the Name of the Lord; the Gurmukh reads the Sermon of the Lord, Har, Har. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਧਾਰੁ ਰਮਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: mai har har naam adhaar rameea |
lines.english: I take the Support of the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੁ ਗਿਰਹੁ ਦਸ ਦੁਆਰ ਹੈ ਜਾ ਕੇ ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਤਸਕਰ ਪੰਚ ਚੋਰ ਲਗਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: ek girahu das duaar hai jaa ke ahinis tasakar panch chor lageea |
lines.english: In the one house of the body, there are ten gates; night and day, the five thieves break in.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਰਮੁ ਅਰਥੁ ਸਭੁ ਹਿਰਿ ਲੇ ਜਾਵਹਿ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਅੰਧੁਲੇ ਖਬਰਿ ਨ ਪਈਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: dharam arath sabh hir le jaaveh manamukh andhule khabar na peea |2|
lines.english: They steal the entire wealth of one's Dharmic faith, but the blind, self-willed manmukh does not know it. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੰਚਨ ਕੋਟੁ ਬਹੁ ਮਾਣਕਿ ਭਰਿਆ ਜਾਗੇ ਗਿਆਨ ਤਤਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: kanchan kott bahu maanak bhariaa jaage giaan tat liv leea |
lines.english: The fortress of the body is overflowing with gold and jewels; when it is awakened by spiritual wisdom, one enshrines love for the essence of reality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਸਕਰ ਹੇਰੂ ਆਇ ਲੁਕਾਨੇ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਪਕੜਿ ਬੰਧਿ ਪਈਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tasakar heroo aae lukaane gur kai sabad pakarr bandh peea |3|
lines.english: The thieves and robbers hide out in the body; through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, they are arrested and locked up. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਪੋਤੁ ਬੋਹਿਥਾ ਖੇਵਟੁ ਸਬਦੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਰਿ ਲੰਘਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam pot bohithaa khevatt sabad gur paar langheea |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord, Har, Har, is the boat, and the Word of the Guru's Shabad is the boatman, to carry us across.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮੁ ਜਾਗਾਤੀ ਨੇੜਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਨਾ ਕੋ ਤਸਕਰੁ ਚੋਰੁ ਲਗਈਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: jam jaagaatee nerr na aavai naa ko tasakar chor lageea |4|
lines.english: The Messenger of Death, the tax collector, does not even come close, and no thieves or robbers can plunder you. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ਸਦਾ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਮੈ ਹਰਿ ਜਸੁ ਕਹਤੇ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਲਹੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: har gun gaavai sadaa din raatee mai har jas kahate ant na laheea |
lines.english: I continuously sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, day and night; singing the Lord's Praises, I cannot find His limits.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੈਨੀ ਦੇਖਿ ਦਰਸੁ ਮਨੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤੈ ਸ੍ਰਵਨ ਬਾਣੀ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੁ ਸੁਣਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: nainee dekh daras man tripatai sravan baanee gurasabad suneea |
lines.english: Gazing upon the Blessed Vision of His Darshan with my eyes, my mind is satisfied; with my ears, I listen to the Guru's Bani, and the Word of His Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮਨੂਆ ਇਕਤੁ ਘਰਿ ਆਵੈ ਮਿਲਉ ਗੋੁਪਾਲ ਨੀਸਾਨੁ ਬਜਈਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: guramukh manooaa ikat ghar aavai milau goupaal neesaan bajeea |5|
lines.english: The mind of the Gurmukh returns to its own home; it meets the Lord of the Universe, to the beat of the celestial drum. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਨਿ ਸੁਨਿ ਆਤਮ ਦੇਵ ਹੈ ਭੀਨੇ ਰਸਿ ਰਸਿ ਰਾਮ ਗੋਪਾਲ ਰਵਈਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: sun sun aatam dev hai bheene ras ras raam gopaal raveea |6|
lines.english: Listening, listening, my soul is softened, delighted by His subtle essence, chanting the Name of the Lord of the Universe. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਸਭ ਸਮ ਕਰਿ ਜਾਣੈ ਨਦਰੀ ਆਵੈ ਸਭੁ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਪਸਰਈਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: ek drisatt sabh sam kar jaanai nadaree aavai sabh braham pasareea |7|
lines.english: With a single, impartial eye, look upon all alike, and see God pervading all. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰੈ ਗੁਣ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹਿ ਵਿਆਪੇ ਤੁਰੀਆ ਗੁਣੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਲਹੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: trai gun maaeaa mohi viaape tureea gun hai guramukh laheea |
lines.english: In the grip of the three qualities, they are engrossed in love and attachment to Maya; only as Gurmukh do they find the absolute quality, absorption in bliss.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਹੈ ਜੋਤਿ ਸਬਾਈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਆਪੇ ਅਲਖੁ ਲਖਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam hai jot sabaaee guramukh aape alakh lakheea |
lines.english: The Light of the Lord's Name permeates all; the Gurmukh knows the unknowable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦੀਨ ਦਇਆਲ ਭਏ ਹੈ ਭਗਤਿ ਭਾਇ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਈਆ ॥੮॥੧॥੪॥
lines.translit: naanak deen deaal bhe hai bhagat bhaae har naam sameea |8|1|4|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Lord has become merciful to the meek; through loving adoration, he merges in the Lord's Name. ||8||1||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸੀਤਲ ਜਲੁ ਧਿਆਵਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਚੰਦਨ ਵਾਸੁ ਸੁਗੰਧ ਗੰਧਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam seetal jal dhiaavahu har chandan vaas sugandh gandheea |
lines.english: Meditate on the cool water of the Name of the Lord, Har, Har. Perfume yourself with the fragrant scent of the Lord, the sandalwood tree.
